title: Coby Chooses the Marines
description: On pages 15–18, this part follows Luffy and Coby aboard Alvida’s ship, where Coby’s fear begins turning into a dream of his own.
scene: Luffy’s arrival disrupts Alvida’s ship and gives Coby the first real chance to say what he wants.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, who's that tough- looking old biddy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: through- out ALL of the seas, lady alvida is...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm gonna be the King of the Pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: AND IF I DIE TRYING... THEN AT LEAST I TRIED!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: said it and I WON'T TAKE IT BACK! No more cringing for me!! From now on, I'll fight for my dreams!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: IT MAKES NO DIFFER-ENCE TO ME...

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: Impossible! No one survives the iron mace!!

summary: Luffy’s confidence contrasts with Coby’s fear. The section is about Coby slowly realizing that his dream is possible once someone refuses to treat Alvida as unbeatable.
